## What this changes

## How you tested it

<!-- What did you actually run, and on what? Distro, GPU, or device is useful for
     anything touching setup, the controller, or rendering. "Built and booted it on
     a Steam Deck" tells us more than a green checkmark. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes (if you touched Go)
- [ ] Boot-tested, if this touches a front-end or boot-pack file
- [ ] No game data, licensed assets, or derivative content added
- [ ] **Written with AI assistance?** Say so here, one line is plenty.

<!--
On that last one: it is not a confession and it does not count against you. This
project is built with AI assistance and says so openly at
https://thug2vandal.com/about. Knowing just tells a reviewer where to read
hardest. The bar is the same either way: does it work, is it tested, does it fit.
-->
